seed_rate.notes: 10-12 kg/ha is recommended for line sowing; 15 kg/ha for broadcasting.

sowing.soil_conditions: Sandy soils in dry and semi-arid regions. High tolerance to light sandy fields.

irrigation.notes: Mothbean is extremely drought-tolerant. Only irrigate if dry spell is prolonged.

fertilizer.notes: Requires low nutrients. Pre-sowing seed treatment with Rhizobium is highly beneficial.

maturity_indicators: Pods turn light brown/yellow and dry up
Leaves wither and shed from the main plant structure
harvest.harvest_method: Pulling up plants manually or scything close to roots
harvest.notes: Dry harvested plants in sun for 3-4 days before manually threshing.
